title: Forge Steel SMP
description: Forge Steel SMP is a Minecraft Survival server using a small selection of Create mods featuring energy, physics, factories, trains, airships and more!
body:
# Forge Steel SMP Modpack

This modpack contains all the current mods required to play on the Forge Steel SMP Server

Forge Steel SMP is a Minecraft Survival server using a small selection of Create mods featuring energy, physics, factories, trains, airships, rockets and more! Build and experiment with amazing contraptions and machines, join our huge rail network. Launch a rocket to space and land on the moon!

![Metro Station](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc57868813559eb416acf1c35256ca73faa943b4.png)


We are in Beta. You are welcome to join and build with us. 

Come join our [discord](https://discord.gg/798vhGA36p)!

## Includes Mods:

| Mod Name | 
| ---------|
| Applied Energetics 2 |
| Aquaculture 2 |
| Biomes O' Plenty | 
| Botarium |
| Carry On |
| Clockwork: Create x Valkyrien Skies | 
| Create | 
| Create Big Cannons | 
| Create Crafts and Additions |
| Create Deco |
| Create Enchantment Industry |
| Create Stuff & Additions |
| Create: Connected | 
| Create Diesel Generators | 
| Create: New Age |
| Create: North Star |
| Create Numismatics |
| Create: Power Loader |
| Create: Steam'n'Rails | 
| Create: The Factory Must Grow |
| Destroy (Create addon) |
| Farmer's Delight |
| FramedBlocks | 
| Immersive Engineering |
| Immersive Paintings | 
| Just Enough Items |
| Mekanism | 
| Mekanism Additions | 
| Mekanism Generators | 
| Modern Train Parts | 
| Storage Drawers |
| TerraBlender | 
| Valkyrien Skies 2 |
| VS Eureka Mod |
